overall.description: A cinematic video game sequence depicting a foggy mountain valley filled with red flowers and mysterious ghostly entities. A mechanical unit with glowing blue lights moves through the field before exiting, while the camera continues forward past a crashed airplane and stone cairns toward towering rock spires shrouded in mist.

steep rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the valley

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a foggy mountain valley with a mechanical unit moving through the field. A crashed airplane lies ahead while ghostly white figures hover in the distant fog. The camera moves forward past stone cairns and red flowers as the mech exits to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: valley approach with towering rock spires visible through fog

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the valley passing the aircraft wreckage

entered.detail: massive white rock spires rising through the fog in the distance
steep layered rock cliff forming the right valley wall

segments.scene_description: With the mechanical unit gone, the camera proceeds through the open valley. The crashed airplane recedes to the left as towering white spires become visible ahead through the fog. The right rock wall grows more prominent while the stone cairn passes by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrowing canyon passage with steep rock walls

events.description: environment transitions from open field to narrower canyon passage between rock walls

agents.ego_description: moving deeper into the foggy canyon toward the towering spires

segments.scene_description: The valley narrows into a canyon passage as the crashed airplane disappears from view behind. The right rock wall looms closer while the stone cairn recedes into the mid-ground. The camera continues toward the massive white spires visible through the thick fog ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy mountain valley that gradually narrows into a steep canyon passage. It begins by gliding past red flowers and stone cairns while a mechanical unit moves through the field and ghostly white figures hover in the distance. As the mechanical unit exits to the left, the camera proceeds forward, leaving a crashed airplane behind as towering white spires emerge through the mist. The scene then shifts as the right rock wall looms closer and the valley constricts, pushing the stone cairn into the mid-ground. Finally, the camera advances deeper into the narrowing canyon, heading directly toward the massive white spires shrouded in thick fog.
